name: M&A Diligence Grid
description: Tabular due diligence review over a virtual data room — produces a structured issues matrix with per-document rows and per-issue columns across corporate, contracts, IP, employment, regulatory, and financial categories.
promptTemplate: Conduct a tabular due diligence review for {{target}} in connection with {{transaction}}. Review all documents in the data room and produce a structured issues matrix covering: corporate structure, material contracts, intellectual property, employment, regulatory compliance, and financial matters. Flag all CRITICAL and MATERIAL issues with recommended actions. Jurisdiction: {{jurisdiction}}.
